title: amaranthus rugulosus
intro: Amaranthus rugulosus, also known as rough pigweed or rough-fruited amaranth, is a species of flowering plant in the amaranth family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Amaranthus rugulosus include reducing fever, treating wounds, and alleviating digestive issues, making it a valuable herbal remedy. Herbal preparations of the plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
